description_long: This is a striking red airplane with a robust, angular fuselage and a pair of straight, mid-mounted wings equipped with four prominent turboprop engines, each featuring large, multi-blade propellers. The aircraft has a forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit with a dark canopy and visible landing gear beneath the nose and wings. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The wings are fitted with underwing ordnance or equipment pods, and the overall design suggests a utilitarian or possibly military function. The surface is smooth and glossy, with dark gray accents on the wings and tail, and small yellow highlights near the wingtips and tail. The airplane's proportions and features indicate it is designed for both performance and durability.
description: A red, mid-wing airplane with four turboprop engines, a forward enclosed cockpit, and a conventional tail, featuring smooth, glossy surfaces and underwing equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the four large propellers, the forward cockpit, and the symmetrical wing and engine arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mid-mounted wings, visible landing gear, and the streamlined fuselage with underwing pods.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, landing gear, and the detailed engine and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four turboprop engines mounted on the wings, two per side.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
